name: @pyreon/native-router-swift
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — SwiftPM package implementing @pyreon/router's API surface (RouterProvider / RouterView / Link / useNavigate / useParams) on top of SwiftUI's NavigationStack. Phase C1 of the PMTC multiplatform router story.

scripts.build: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && command -v swift >/dev/null 2>&1; then swift build; else echo '[native-router-swift] non-Darwin or no swift on PATH; skipping build (SwiftUI is Darwin-only)'; fi
scripts.test: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && command -v swift >/dev/null 2>&1; then swift test; else echo '[native-router-swift] non-Darwin or no swift on PATH; skipping tests (SwiftUI is Darwin-only)'; fi
scripts.lint: echo '[native-router-swift] SwiftLint not yet integrated; skipping lint'
scripts.typecheck: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && command -v swift >/dev/null 2>&1; then swift build; else echo '[native-router-swift] non-Darwin or no swift on PATH; skipping typecheck (SwiftUI is Darwin-only)'; fi
